global_context.scene_description: A bold editorial cartoon-illustrated split-frame composition, single image with a clean vertical divider down the middle. NOT a customer's emotional reaction split — this split shows the JOB ITSELF: what people imagine an AC install looks like, vs. what it actually looks like. Editorial cartoon illustration style, NOT photorealistic, NOT flat infographic — closer to New Yorker editorial cartoon meets modern brand illustration. Theatrical color blocking per frame. LEFT FRAME (cool blue-grey background, chaotic mood, exaggerated cartoon dread): a Phoenix-style suburban house with multiple things going wrong simultaneously — walls partially demolished with debris piles, dust clouds rising, FOUR contractors swarming around with various tools and clipboards looking aggressive, a stack of paperwork visible, a thought-bubble / floating element showing '$20,000' in red bold, a calendar in the corner with multiple weeks marked off in red X marks. The scene reads as DAYS OR WEEKS of disruption, an overwhelmed homeowner watching from the corner with hands on his head. RIGHT FRAME (warm sunlit background, calm and clean): the SAME house, completely intact and clean. ONE single ASH-branded service truck parked out front, ONE technician in a clean uniform working calmly at an exterior AC unit, the homeowner casually drinking coffee on the porch in the background, a small calendar in the corner with a SINGLE day circled and a 'DONE BY 5PM' tag. The scene reads as ONE WORKDAY, professional, calm. A bold black vertical line separates the two halves. Above the entire image, a clean banner-style headline reads in bold uppercase: 'WHAT YOU'RE PICTURING. WHAT IT ACTUALLY IS.' At the bottom, a small italic caption: 'New AC install — same house, two stories.' Mood: the satisfying click of a wrong assumption being corrected via direct visualization of the JOB itself. Editorial cartoon illustration with theatrical color blocking.

lighting.quality: left frame cool/chaotic with dust diffusion, right frame warm/clean golden-hour

composition.framing: vertical split-frame, two equal halves divided by a bold vertical line, headline banner across top, small caption strip across bottom
composition.focal_point: the contrast between the chaotic 4-contractor scene on the left and the calm 1-truck scene on the right
